channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion from stock sales to fund AI buildout
item.description: Alphabet said it plans to sell $80 billion in stock, including through a $10 billion investment by Berkshire Hathaway.

item.title: Trump tells CNBC: 'I don't care' if Iran negotiations are over
item.description: President Trump spoke with CNBC's Eamon Javers about the latest with the Iran war in an interview Monday.

item.title: Biotech takeover target Abivax sinks over 30% after bowel disease drug trial update
item.description: Shares of French biotech Abivax tumbled 32% after it reported fresh data on its lead asset.

item.title: Blackstone closes its largest Asia private equity fund at over $13 billion
item.description: Blackstone raised $13.1 billion for its latest Asia private equity vehicle, marking the largest private equity fundraise the firm has done in the region.

item.title: These top dividend stocks can help ride out market volatility, investor says
item.description: ClearBridge Investments' Michael Clarfeld recently bought three names he said are underappreciated right now — and they have solid dividends.

item.title: Amazon's four-day Prime Day event starts June 23, as shoppers battle inflation
item.description: Amazon's four-day shopping fest comes after U.S. consumer sentiment dropped in May to a record low.

item.title: European stocks rebound as investors await key inflation data; Abivax shares tumble
item.description: Investors are awaiting data that will shed further light on the economic impact of the U.S.-Iran war.

item.title: HPE skyrockets 30% on biggest earnings beat since 2018
item.description: HPE's blowout second-quarter earnings report was highlighted by a strong Cloud & AI segment that showed soaring server revenue.

item.title: Trump administration proposes 25% tariff on Brazilian goods over unfair trade practices
item.description: U.S Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said that the investigation under Section 301 was launched at the direction of U.S. President Donald Trump.

item.title: The stock market just did something eerily similar to the dot-com bubble top in 2000
item.description: Surging stock performance in May was concentrated in the AI adjacent.

item.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
item.description: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.

item.title: Trump's 'big beautiful bill' turned 529 plans into 'lifelong education' accounts, expert says: How to take advantage
item.description: New rules allow 529 plan funds to pay for eligible career training, certifications, licensing fees and continuing education costs.

item.title: NBA star Stephen Curry partners with Chinese sportswear giant Li-Ning
item.description: Stephen Curry has entered into a partnership with Li-Ning, which would involve product development as well as sports culture initiatives.

item.title: A countertrend buy signal has flashed in this software name, says Katie Stockton
item.description: Katie Stockton breaks down the technicals in this software name.

item.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: China learns to build without Nvidia
item.description: Chinese companies are increasingly seeking Nvidia alternatives to develop self-sufficient systems, even if their own tech remains in the early stages.

item.title: Anthropic confidentially files IPO prospectus with SEC, prepping Wall Street for landmark AI deal
item.description: Anthropic said it confidentially filed its IPO prospectus with the SEC, setting up a potentially historic share sale for investors ready to jump into AI.

item.title: Asia-Pacific markets close mixed as Iran war uncertainty keeps investors on edge
item.description: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed on Tuesday as investors weighed renewed uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.

item.title: Blue Origin launchpad damaged in rocket explosion may not be restored until 2028, NASA's Isaacman says
item.description: NASA has tapped Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin for several contracts in the agency's Artemis return-to-the-moon program.

item.title: Microsoft and Google are late to AI coding, but 'absolutely critical' they compete for growth
item.description: Coding tools are becoming an increasingly big target for Google and Microsoft as they try to catch up to Anthropic and OpenAI.

item.title: McDonald's unveils new global growth strategy to win over diners as competition rises
item.description: McDonald's new growth plan comes as inflation and high gas prices mean restaurants are competing for a smaller pool of customers.

item.title: Stock market corrections will happen: Here's how we navigate the ups and downs
item.description: We concern ourselves far more with making sure we are investing in the right companies.

item.title: CNBC Points Pro: How to maximize your American Airlines credit card
item.description: Points expert Jason Stauffer explains how to think about using an American Airlines credit card and AAdvantage miles.

item.title: S&P 500 closes at a record to kick off June trading as tech rally overpowers oil spike: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 rose on Monday, even as oil prices advanced, with Nvidia leading technology higher following the launch of a new chip for PCs.

item.title: FedEx Freight CEO says the spinoff will help the company 'leapfrog' competitors
item.description: FedEx Freight CEO John Smith said the company's separation from FedEx will allow it to invest more aggressively in growth initiatives.

item.title: Stargate live updates: OpenAI's Altman says 'people are right to be anxious' about AI
item.description: OpenAI, Oracle and Related Digital discuss the Stargate Michigan buildout, AI infrastructure, jobs and community plans.

item.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: A rally in tech stocks helped the market overcome the drag of higher oil prices and lifted the S&P 500 to a new all-time high and a closing record Monday.

item.title: Trump administration plans to drop DOJ's $1.8B 'lawfare' fund, reports say
item.description: Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer said he was launching an effort to kill "slush fund" by forcing Republicans to vote on it.

item.title: SpaceX sets aside up to 5% of shares in IPO for certain employees and friends
item.description: In an updated IPO prospectus, SpaceX said that up to 5% of stock being offered by the company in the offering will be available in a direct share program.

item.title: Florida AG sues OpenAI, seeks to hold CEO Altman personally liable for alleged harms
item.description: The complaint said the harms are the result of OpenAI's "insatiable quest to win the AI arms race and amass large fortunes."

item.title: Berkshire's bet on Taylor Morrison suggests the housing market may have bottomed
item.description: Analysts say the deal between Berkshire Hathaway and Taylor Morrison signals that the housing market may have bottomed.
